headline: A Look At CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Valuation After Recent Pullback And Capital Plan Update
summary: CenterPoint Energy stock reaction and recent performance CenterPoint Energy (CNP) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 2% over the past month and roughly 2% over the past 3 months.
